$puzzleId..validate:
newData.hasChildren(['img', 'msg', 'difficulty', 'createdAt'])
                      && newData.child('img').isString()
                      && newData.child('img').val().length < 200000
                      && newData.child('msg').isString()
                      && newData.child('msg').val().length <= 200
                      && newData.child('sender').isString()
                      && newData.child('sender').val().length <= 40
                      && newData.child('difficulty').isNumber()
                      && newData.child('difficulty').val() >= 0
                      && newData.child('difficulty').val() <= 3
                      && newData.child('createdAt').isNumber()
                      && $puzzleId.length === 8
